---
title: "Notes"
subtitle: "A working notebook and digital garden"
listing:
  contents: "**/*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
  categories: true
  exclude:
    title: "Notes"
toc: false
---

Papers I've read, methods I'm learning, books that shaped my thinking, and ideas that don't have a home yet. Some of this grows into research. Most of it doesn't. That's fine.

Nothing here is finished. Consider it a working notebook.

🌱 **Seed** -- rough, first pass, might just be a question.

🌿 **Sprout** -- revisited at least once, starting to take shape.

🌳 **Evergreen** -- I'm fairly confident in this one.
